name: PlanetScale
description: PlanetScale is a serverless MySQL-compatible database platform built on Vitess. Use this API to manage databases, branches, deploy requests, and connection credentials programmatically.

capabilities.name: manage_databases
capabilities.description: Create, list, get, and delete databases in your PlanetScale organization.

capabilities.name: manage_branches
capabilities.description: Create, list, and delete database branches for safe schema changes.

capabilities.name: manage_deploy_requests
capabilities.description: Create, review, and deploy schema change requests between branches.

capabilities.name: manage_passwords
capabilities.description: Create and manage connection passwords (credentials) for database branches.

capabilities.name: get_database_schema
capabilities.description: Retrieve the schema of a database branch including tables, columns, and indexes.
